description_long: This is a large, L-shaped office building with a classical architectural style, featuring tall arched windows arranged in a regular grid across its facade. The exterior is finished in a light, warm-toned stone or concrete, with decorative cornices and pilasters adding visual interest to the upper and lower sections. The ground floor includes a series of large, rectangular entryways and windows, some of which are recessed, suggesting multiple access points and possibly retail or lobby spaces. The upper floors are characterized by repetitive, vertically oriented windows with arched tops, separated by ornate columns and decorative elements. The roofline is flat with prominent cornices and corner detailing, giving the building a stately, institutional appearance. No visible signage is present, and the building appears to be designed for commercial office use in an urban environment.
description: A stately, L-shaped office building with tall arched windows, ornate classical detailing, and a light stone facade. The structure features a flat roof and multiple large entryways at street level.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main facade with tall arched windows, decorative cornices, and the primary entrance area.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the L-shape, with both the main and side facades visible, showing the regular window pattern and recessed ground floor entries.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the shorter wing of the L-shape, with the same arched window pattern and decorative elements.
description_view_3: Rear angled view displaying the long facade, arched windows, and additional ground floor entryways, emphasizing the building's length.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically oriented arched windows in a grid pattern, with each floor featuring a consistent row of windows separated by pilasters.
